description_long: This apple is medium-sized with a rounded, slightly asymmetrical shape and a subtle dimple at the top where the stem is located. Its skin displays a blend of warm yellow-green and red hues, with the red coloration appearing more dominant on one side and blending into the yellow-green on the other. The surface is smooth with a natural matte sheen, and faint speckles are visible across the skin, typical of many apple varieties. The stem is short and brown, emerging from a shallow depression at the top. There are no visible stickers, labels, or significant blemishes on the skin. The apple appears fresh and ripe, with a firm, unbroken exterior.
description: A medium-sized, round apple with a smooth, red and yellow-green skin and a short brown stem.
description_view_0: Mostly yellow-green with red blush, stem visible at top.
description_view_1: Redder side with some yellow-green patches, stem still visible.
description_view_2: Predominantly red surface, yellow-green area recedes, stem less visible.
description_view_3: Red and yellow-green blend, stem depression visible, smoother gradient.
